name: @posthog/replay-anonymizer
description: Node bindings for the session-replay anonymizer

scripts.build: pnpm run build:cargo --release && pnpm run build:move-lib && pnpm run build:typescript
scripts.build:dev: pnpm run build:cargo && pnpm run build:move-lib:dev && pnpm run build:typescript
scripts.build:move-lib: TARGET_DIR=${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-../target} && cp "$TARGET_DIR/release/libreplay_anonymizer_node.dylib" index.node 2>/dev/null || cp "$TARGET_DIR/release/libreplay_anonymizer_node.so" index.node || (echo "No valid library file found in $TARGET_DIR/release/" && exit 1)
scripts.build:move-lib:dev: TARGET_DIR=${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-../target} && cp "$TARGET_DIR/debug/libreplay_anonymizer_node.dylib" index.node 2>/dev/null || cp "$TARGET_DIR/debug/libreplay_anonymizer_node.so" index.node || (echo "No valid library file found in $TARGET_DIR/debug/" && exit 1)
